meaning: n.认可证颁发者(尤指批准书籍出版或戏剧演出的官员)
examples: All these intentions are affirmative and hardly bar the licensor or licensee from imposing additional terms.
All these intentions are affirmative; none prevents the licensor or licensee from imposing additional terms.
A licensor can provide the software under more than one license, perhaps one that is open source and one that's proprietary.
The licensor has used that connection to sign deals with other retailers, like Tesco and Zeller's.
As a licensor, Atari extends its brand and franchises into other media, merchandising and publishing categories.
